prompt:
A vertical 2:3 premium design poster with two sections, inspired by elegant perfume advertisement aesthetics, luxury branding, soft pink tones, and a magical storytelling atmosphere.
TOP HALF (PROCESS / TRANSFORMATION SEQUENCE)
A seamless horizontal sequence of 5 pencil sketch stages on a clean white background, flowing smoothly from left to right with no visible borders.
The sequence illustrates the transformation into a luxury trophy:
Motion – Abstract flowing lines and light gesture strokes, symbolizing energy and achievement in motion.
Emergence – The lines begin forming a graceful upward structure, hinting at a sculptural object.
Forming Shape – A recognizable trophy silhouette starts to appear, with soft curves and elegant proportions.
Refinement – Details sharpen: handles, base, and structure become clearer and more defined.
Final Sketch – A complete, polished pencil rendering of a premium trophy with intricate design details.
Style: delicate graphite pencil, soft shading, artistic motion trails, minimalist luxury sketch aesthetic.
BOTTOM HALF (FINAL PRODUCT SHOWCASE)
A hyper-realistic, premium gold trophy placed on a circular pedestal.
Material: polished gold with soft reflections
Base: black marble or glossy stone with a metallic nameplate
Background: flowing satin fabric in soft blush pink tones
Lighting: warm, cinematic glow with subtle sparkles and dreamy particles
Atmosphere: magical, elegant, aspirational luxury
TEXT ELEMENTS (LUXURY BRAND STYLE)
Top center (above sketches):
“FROM VISION TO VICTORY”
subtext: “Where ambition takes form.”
Bottom left (main copy):
“CRAFTED WITH PASSION”
“DEFINED BY EXCELLENCE”
Tagline (small, elegant):
“More than a trophy. A symbol of legacy.”
STYLE KEYWORDS
Luxury • Perfume-ad aesthetic • Soft pink palette • Gold accents • Minimal • Elegant • Dreamlike • Editorial • High-end branding • Cinematic lighting • Ultra-clean composition
